title: StatisticsViewer
description: A statistics plugin showing kills, deaths, and playtime leaderboards ingame using a command.
body:
# 📊 StatisticsViewer

A modern, user-friendly statistics plugin for Paper servers that displays player statistics in an intuitive chest GUI interface.

Simply type `/stats`, `/playerstats` or `/statistics`
 in-game to open the statistics menu!

The plugin shows **three** different **categories** of playerstats: **Kills, Deaths and Playtime**.

## 🐛 Support

If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, please contact me on Discord: `starmaster1`
